## Diagnostics bundle

Attach or reference the generated artifacts that match the failure:

- the relevant evidence file under `plans/evidence/`;
- the matching session-state file under `target/`;
- the matching diagnostics-export file under `target/`;
- the package manifest under `target/gui-phase6-package/`, if packaging was involved;
- screenshots or logs only if they add information that is not already present in the metadata bundle.
